'''yavomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceacum|ceacum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceacum|ceacum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yavomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yævemeth|yævemeth]] || [[word:yævemej|yævemej]] || [[word:yævemesh|yævemesh]] || [[word:yæveme|yæveme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yavovomoth|yavovomoth]] || [[word:yavovomoj|yavovomoj]] || [[word:yavovomosh|yavovomosh]] || [[word:yavovomo|yavovomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yavomoth|yavomoth]] || [[word:yavomoj|yavomoj]] || [[word:yavomosh|yavomosh]] || [[word:yavomo|yavomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yavofmoth|yavofmoth]] || [[word:yavofmoj|yavofmoj]] || [[word:yavofmosh|yavofmosh]] || [[word:yavofmof|yavofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yavomotho|yavomotho]] || [[word:yavomojo|yavomojo]] || [[word:yavomosho|yavomosho]] || [[word:yavomoko|yavomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yavomoth|yavomoth]] || [[word:yavomoj|yavomoj]] || [[word:yavomosh|yavomosh]] || [[word:yavomo|yavomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yavomothol|yavomothol]] || [[word:yavomojol|yavomojol]] || [[word:yavomoshol|yavomoshol]] || [[word:yavomokol|yavomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yavomothotho|yavomothotho]] || [[word:yavomojojo|yavomojojo]] || [[word:yavomoshosho|yavomoshosho]] || [[word:yavomoko|yavomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yavomothon|yavomothon]] || [[word:yavomojon|yavomojon]] || [[word:yavomoshon|yavomoshon]] || [[word:yavomokon|yavomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yavomothoro|yavomothoro]] || [[word:yavomojoro|yavomojoro]] || [[word:yavomoshoro|yavomoshoro]] || [[word:yavomokoro|yavomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
